CustomField.description: Field path on the host record (e.g. Service_Appointment.Account.Name, WorkOrder.Subject) read at runtime to pre-fill this question. Spanning lookups are supported. Empty answers are populated; existing answers are not overwritten.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field path on the host record to pre-fill this question (e.g. WorkOrder.Subject or Service_Appointment.Account.Name).
CustomField.label: Default Value Source
